categories.name: Graphics Design
categories.description: Master smartphone design, Adobe Photoshop, brand aesthetics, and AI-assisted graphics production.

categories.name: Web Development
categories.description: From foundational HTML & CSS to advanced Full-Stack software engineering and AI-driven Vibe Coding.

categories.name: Video Animation
categories.description: Produce captivating visual animations, film cuts, and cinematic effects using only your smartphone or AI systems.

categories.name: UI/UX Design
categories.description: Create beautiful user-centered design system frameworks, blueprints, mobile layouts, and responsive app interfaces.

categories.name: Cyber Security
categories.description: Understand software security structures, system networking, threat defense mechanisms, and infrastructure guardrails.

categories.name: Prompt Engineering
categories.description: Harness the elite powers of LLM APIs, prompt sequencing, contextual injection, and autonomous agent orchestration.

courses.title: Smartphone Design
courses.subtitle: Create Professional Graphic Designs on Your Phone
courses.description: Learn typography, canvas layouts, color theories, and visual marketing assets creation using specialized smartphone apps. Ideal for beginners starting custom design agencies.

courses.title: Photoshop & Illustrator
courses.subtitle: Master the Standard Professional Graphics Toolkit
courses.description: Deep dive into raster imaging, vector creations, layer gating, texturing, digital manipulations, and print-ready banner production.

courses.title: AI Graphics Design
courses.subtitle: Supercharge Creative Workflows with Generative AI
courses.description: Leverage cutting-edge text-to-image engines, neural image editing, styling transfer, and mock asset generations to work 10x faster than traditional designers.

courses.title: Free Class (HTML & CSS)
courses.subtitle: The Absolute Foundation of Modern Web Software
courses.description: Start your software path for free! Build clean semantic HTML structures, beautiful responsive grids with CSS Flexbox, custom form layouts, and basic site deployments.

courses.title: Frontend Development
courses.subtitle: Build Interactive Web Interfaces with modern Javascript & React
courses.description: Design dynamic, pixel-perfect single-page web applications. Comprehensive 3-month curriculum covering HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, and NextJS.

courses.title: Full Stack Development
courses.subtitle: Become a Complete Full-Cycle Software Engineer
courses.description: Our most comprehensive program. Build enterprise database models, backend APIs (Node/Express), user logs systems, Cloud deployments, and secure transaction workflows.

courses.title: AI Web Development (Vibe Coding)
courses.subtitle: Build Complete Software Apps Using Prompt Engines
courses.description: Learn modern LLM pairing. Covers prompt engineering, web development basics, adding backend, deployment, and how and where to get cheap hosting and domains.

courses.title: Smartphone Video
courses.subtitle: Professional Shoots and Edits on Your Mobile
courses.description: Master camera angles, lighting dynamics, narrative edits, clean sound overlays, and transition graphics on mobile applications like CapCut and Kinemaster.

courses.title: AI Video Production
courses.subtitle: Generate Cinematic Animations from Pure Text
courses.description: Generate immersive cinematic renders, virtual human announcers, automated vocal synth voiceovers, and intelligent transitions using specialized AI video services.

courses.title: UI/UX Design Masterclass
courses.subtitle: Design Delightful Interactive Systems
courses.description: Develop user personas, site blueprints, interactive wireframes, and responsive component libraries within Figma. Create portfolios that win global contracts.

courses.title: Cyber Security Fundamentals
courses.subtitle: Defend Systems and Network Infostructures
courses.description: Go from beginner to job-ready in 3 months. Learn fundamental security concepts, networking, hands-on ethical hacking with Nmap, defensive hardening, Wi-Fi hacking, cloud infrastructure IAM, and SOC Security Information/Event Management operations.

courses.title: Prompt Engineering Essentials
courses.subtitle: Master the Language of Cognitive Machines
courses.description: Discover systematic prompt patterns, chains of thought sequencing, zero-shot and few-shot conditioning, embeddings setups, and agentic workflows creation.

course_stages.title: Module 1: Foundational Frameworks & Essentials
course_stages.description: Understand the basic vocabulary, system configurations, layout setups, and primary tools associated with this training.

course_stages.title: Module 2: Practical Exercises & Real-World Projects
course_stages.description: Engage in curated hands-on workshops. Build full physical design assets or software items based on specific customer prompts.

course_stages.title: Module 3: Mastery Review, Portfolio & Capstone Examination
course_stages.description: Integrate the entire toolkit. Package your assets into a professional career portfolio and complete the final Delight Tech Academy graduation checkout.

course_stages.title: Month 1: UI Frameworks & Web Styling Foundations
course_stages.description: HTML structure and tags. Responsive, stunning page design patterns utilizing pure CSS & utility-first Tailwind CSS classes.

course_stages.title: Month 2: Coding Interactions & Dynamic Logic
course_stages.description: Unlock JavaScript ES6 syntax, client-side event loops, API integration, and strong typed modeling via TypeScript.

course_stages.title: Month 3: Production Delivery with React & NextJS
course_stages.description: Build robust single-page applications. Master React states, NextJS App Router architectures, server layout, and production Vercel hosting.

course_stages.title: Module 1: Prompt Engineering & Web Basics
course_stages.description: Introduction to prompt styling guidelines and AI-assisted structure building. Formulate precise context instructions and generate standard HTML & CSS layout pages.

course_stages.title: Module 2: Server Integration & Adding Backend
course_stages.description: Orchestrate integrated database schemas, define system backend servers, and adding backend security routes using prompt guidelines.

course_stages.title: Module 3: Production Deployments & Cheap Domains/Hosting
course_stages.description: Learn modern app deployment workflows. Find out exactly how and where to get cheap hosting and domains, and deploy your live app.

course_stages.title: MONTH 1 – Foundations (Beginner)
course_stages.description: Introduction to Cybersecurity • Cyber Threats & Career Paths • Networking Fundamentals • Operating Systems & Linux Basics • Security Concepts & Risk Management

course_stages.title: MONTH 2 – Hands-On Security (Intermediate)
course_stages.description: Ethical Hacking Fundamentals • Reconnaissance & Scanning (Nmap) • Web & Network Security • System Hardening & Defense • Incident Response Basics

course_stages.title: MONTH 3 – Advanced & Career Readiness (Expert)
course_stages.description: Advanced Ethical Hacking • Privilege Escalation & Wireless Security • Cloud Security & IAM • SOC Operations & SIEM Overview • Capstone Project & Career Preparation. Outcome: Beginner to job-ready in 3 months, practical hands-on skills, career & certification guidance (Security+, CEH).

registrations.message: Hello, what times are the classes for smartphone graphics design scheduled in Dugbe?
I want to know if physical attendance is binary or we can participate hybrid.
